reported_speech_time_place_changes_all_l.name: reported speech time place changes all levels

questions.question: In a past report, change “I am busy now”: She said {a1}.

a1.answer: that she was busy then

questions.question: Report “I have a meeting today” later the same evening: He said {a1}.

a1.answer: that he had a meeting that day
options: that he had a meeting that day
that he has a meeting today
to have a meeting that day
if he had a meeting today

questions.question: Report “I saw Anna yesterday” two days later: Mark said {a1}.

a1.answer: that he had seen Anna the day before
options: that he had seen Anna the day before
that he had seen Anna tomorrow

questions.question: Report “We will leave tomorrow” after the trip: They said {a1}.

a1.answer: that they would leave the next day
options: that they would leave the next day

questions.question: Report “This book is useful” when the book is no longer near you: Tom said {a1}.

a1.answer: that that book was useful

questions.question: Report “These keys are mine” after leaving the room: Maria said {a1}.

a1.answer: that those keys were hers

questions.question: Report “It is cold here” from another place: He said {a1}.

a1.answer: that it was cold there

questions.question: Report “I moved here two years ago” later: She said {a1}.

a1.answer: that she had moved there two years before
options: that she had moved there two years before
that she moved here two years ago
to move there two years before
that she had moved here ago

questions.question: Report “I finished it last week” a month later: He said {a1}.

a1.answer: that he had finished it the week before
options: that he had finished it the week before
that he finished it last week
that he had finished it next week

questions.question: Report “The course starts next week” later: She said {a1}.

a1.answer: that the course started the following week
options: that the course started the following week
that the course starts next week
that started the course next week

questions.question: The report is still on the same day. Choose the natural clause: He says {a1}.

a1.answer: that the meeting is today
options: that the meeting was that day
